global_kris.logic_summary: Measures the rate of protocol deviations per participant in study C4891006. This includes deviations related to ARV-471 and abemaciclib dosing, missed RECIST v1.1 tumor assessments, or out-of-window visits during the 28-day cycles.
global_kris.corrective_action: Review the protocol deviation log in the CTMS to identify trends. Retrain the site on the C4891006 Schedule of Activities, particularly regarding the abemaciclib lead-in period and reduced SoA guidelines from Amendment 4.

global_kris.logic_summary: Calculates the frequency of adverse events per participant, graded by NCI CTCAE v5.0. It specifically monitors for dose-limiting toxicities (DLTs) during the Cycle 1 observation period and overall safety of the ARV-471/abemaciclib combination.
global_kris.corrective_action: Review the AE eCRF for timely entry and accurate CTCAE v5.0 grading. If the threshold is breached, contact the site to ensure proper AE reporting and verify if any DLT criteria were met during Cycle 1.

global_kris.logic_summary: Measures the rate of serious adverse events (SAEs) reported per participant receiving ARV-471 and abemaciclib. This tracks critical safety signals throughout the screening, lead-in, and 28-day combination treatment cycles.
global_kris.corrective_action: Cross-check the SAE forms in the EDC with the pharmacovigilance safety database. Ensure the site is following the updated direct clinical team contact process for medical escalation as per Amendment 4.

global_kris.logic_summary: Evaluates the rate at which participants discontinue the study prior to completing the planned Phase 1b/2 objectives. It monitors if tolerability issues with the 200mg ARV-471 and 150mg abemaciclib starting doses are driving early dropouts.
global_kris.corrective_action: Analyze the Study Disposition eCRF for trends in early withdrawals. Discuss dose modification or interruption guidelines with the Principal Investigator to manage tolerability while maintaining study participation.

study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Calculates the proportion of missed EORTC-QLQ-C30 patient-reported outcome assessments. This tracks compliance with capturing general cancer-related symptoms in participants treated with ARV-471 and abemaciclib.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Check the ePRO system for missing EORTC-QLQ-C30 data at scheduled visits. Retrain site staff on reminding participants to complete the questionnaires during clinic visits on Day 1 of the 28-day cycles.

study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Measures the percentage of missed EQ-5D-5L health status questionnaires expected from participants. This evaluates compliance with exploratory PRO endpoints during the combination treatment phase.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Identify missed EQ-5D-5L assessments in the ePRO portal. Contact the site coordinator to emphasize the importance of PRO collection prior to clinical assessments and ARV-471/abemaciclib dosing.

study_specific_kris.iqmp_risk_id: PK data is secondary endpoint for the study (KRI_ MISSED_PK_POINTS) and is critical data per IQMP.
study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Tracks the proportion of missed PK blood draws for ARV-471, ARV-473, abemaciclib, and its metabolites (M2, M18, M20). This is especially critical during the intensive PK collection in the Abemaciclib Lead-In Period (Days -7 and -1) and Cycle 1.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Review the PK sample tracking logs and EDC to identify missed timepoints. Retrain the site on the intensive PK sampling schedule introduced in Amendment 3 and ensure proper lab kit availability.

study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Evaluates the rate at which participants discontinue the study prior to completing the planned Phase 1b/2 objectives. It monitors if tolerability issues with the 200mg ARV-471 and 150mg abemaciclib starting doses are driving early dropouts.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Analyze the Study Disposition eCRF for trends in early withdrawals. Discuss dose modification or interruption guidelines with the Principal Investigator to manage tolerability while maintaining study participation.

study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Calculates the proportion of missed tumor assessments evaluated per RECIST v1.1 criteria. This is vital for determining the primary and secondary efficacy endpoints like ORR, DoR, and PFS in participants with A/MBC.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Review the Tumor Assessment eCRF and imaging vendor portal for missing scans. Remind the site of the required imaging schedule to ensure accurate documentation of disease progression or response.
